headline: Agentic coding tooling dominated the quarter as infrastructure strain and legal and political friction around the major labs surfaced.
body: AI-assisted development led the window, with Claude Code spreading into IDEs through a Visual Studio extension that surfaces native diffs and compiler context, and into infrastructure configuration via the Cloudflare MCP. Tencent WorkBuddy entered as a multi-agent desktop product with 100-plus domain experts and a skill marketplace, reinforcing the rotation toward subagents, skills, and agentic workflows. Pressure points emerged off the technical track: Microsoft turned to AWS to ease a GitHub AI capacity crunch, Anthropic was sued over Claude Max limits, and the White House escalated its stance against Anthropic. New entrants including knowledge graphs, Gaussian splatting, dense rewards, and trace analysis signal early movement that has not yet consolidated.

cited_items.title: Tencent Workbuddy: RIP Claude,Codex! This is ACTUALLY quite a bit CRAZY!
Microsoft turns to AWS as GitHub faces AI capacity crunch
Anthropic Sued over Alleged False Advertising on Claude Max Subscription Limits
The White House Is Ratcheting Up Its War Against Anthropic
Cloudflare CAPTCHA on at least one ampersand
Show HN: Claude Code for Visual Studio (native diff with accept/reject)
